subject: Following up from our call - Jordan from earlier today
body:
Hi Ben,

This is Jordan. I called your shop earlier today and spoke with someone on your team. They mentioned you're the owner and passed along your email.

I was asking about your residential and commercial work, and your team said you've been around a while. Solid operation from what I could tell.

The reason I was reaching out is pretty simple. I work with contractors like you to make sure every call that comes into your business gets answered and handled properly, even when you and your crew are out on jobs. No voicemail, no missed opportunities.

We built an AI receptionist that answers your phone 24/7, books appointments, and handles customer questions exactly the way you would. It sounds like a real person, not a robot menu. Your customers would never know the difference.

A lot of HVAC and AC shops we work with were losing 3-5 jobs a week just from missed calls during busy hours or after 5 PM. That adds up fast when your average job is $800-$2,000.

If you're open to it, I can set up a free test on your own business line so you can hear exactly how it sounds. No commitment, no pitch. Just try it and see.

My number is (513) 778-8336 if you want to call or text.

Talk soon,
Jordan
Claw Ops

subject: Following up - Jordan from the call today
body:
Hi,

This is Jordan. I spoke with Andy at your shop earlier today. He mentioned the manager handles operations and that email was the best way to reach you.

Andy said you guys do both residential and commercial work. Sounds like a solid operation.

I'll keep this short. I work with contractors to make sure no call goes unanswered, even during jobs, after hours, or when the phones are ringing off the hook during busy season.

We built an AI receptionist that picks up every call, books appointments, and answers customer questions. It sounds natural, not like a phone tree. Your customers talk to it like they'd talk to a real receptionist.

Most contractors we work with were missing 20-30% of their inbound calls. At your average job value, that's real money walking out the door.

Happy to set up a free test on your line so you can hear it for yourself. No cost, no commitment.

Call or text me at (513) 778-8336.

Jordan
Claw Ops

subject: Jordan calling back - spoke with your team today
body:
Hi,

This is Jordan. I called your office earlier today and spoke with your team. They mentioned you've been family owned since 1972, over fifty years. That's impressive and says a lot about how you run things.

They gave me this email as the best way to reach the owners, so here I am.

I work with established contractors like Sun Glow to solve one specific problem: missed calls. When your techs are out in the field and the office is busy, calls slip through. After hours, weekends, holidays, same thing.

We built an AI receptionist that answers every call, 24/7. It books appointments, answers common questions, and sounds like a real person on your team. No phone tree, no hold music, no voicemail.

For a company with your reputation and 50+ years of trust built up, every missed call is a customer who might end up with a competitor. That's the part that stings.

I'd love to set up a quick free test on your line so your team can hear exactly how it works. No obligation.

Call or text anytime: (513) 778-8336.

Jordan
Claw Ops

subject: Following up from our call - Jordan
body:
Hi,

This is Jordan. I spoke with Mallory at your office earlier today. She mentioned the owners were out but gave me this email to reach you.

I see you've been serving San Diego since 2005, twenty years strong with over 1,200 reviews. Your customers clearly trust you, and that kind of reputation takes real work to build.

I also noticed you offer 24/7 live answering on your site, which tells me you already understand how important it is to never miss a call. That's exactly the space I work in.

We built an AI receptionist specifically for HVAC contractors. It answers every call, books appointments directly into your system, and handles common customer questions. It sounds like a real person, not a robot. The difference from a traditional answering service is that it actually books the job instead of just taking a message.

For a company running specials on installations and financing, you want every lead captured the moment they call. Not a callback three hours later when they've already called someone else.

Happy to set up a free test so you can hear it on your own line. No commitment.

Call or text: (513) 778-8336.

Jordan
Claw Ops

subject: Jordan here - Kelly said to send this your way
body:
Hi,

This is Jordan. I spoke with Kelly over at your shop earlier today. Had a great conversation with her about how your team handles after-hours calls and dispatch.

Kelly mentioned that decisions like this run through you, and she gave me your email directly. So I wanted to follow up while the conversation is still fresh.

Here's what came up: Kelly said your after-hours calls go through on-call techs and a phone tree for emergencies. That works for the urgent stuff. But she wasn't sure what happens when five calls hit at once during peak season, or whether some of those first-time callers end up in voicemail and never call back.

That's the exact problem we solve. We built an AI receptionist for contractors that answers every call, 24/7. It books appointments, qualifies the job, and gets customers scheduled on the spot. No voicemail, no message pad, no callbacks three hours later when the customer already called someone else.

For a company that's been around 60+ years, your reputation does the heavy lifting. But if a new customer calls and nobody picks up, they don't know your reputation yet. They just call the next name on Google.

I'd love to set up a quick free test so you and Kelly can hear how it handles a real call on your line. No cost, no strings.

Call or text anytime: (513) 778-8336.

Jordan
Claw Ops
